parameters.jsonBody:
={
 "max_width": 480,
 "template_id": "enterTemplateID",
 "modifications": {
 "Scenes.elements": [
 {
 "name": "Intro Comp",
 "type": "composition",
 "track": 1,
 "elements": [
 {
 "name": "Image-1",
 "type": "image",
 "source": "{{ $('Leo - Get imageId').item.json.body.generations_by_pk.generated_images[0].url }}"
 },
 {
 "name": "Subtitles-1",
 "type": "text",
 "transcript_source": "Voiceover-1",
 "width": "86.66%",
 "height": "37.71%",
 "x_alignment": "50%",
 "y_alignment": "50%",
 "fill_color": "#ffffff",
 "stroke_color": "#333333",
 "stroke_width": "1.05 vmin",
 "font_family": "Inter",
 "font_weight": "700",
 "font_size": "8 vmin",
 "background_color": "rgba(255,255,255,0.2)",
 "background_x_padding": "26%",
 "background_y_padding": "7%",
 "background_border_radius": "28%",
 "transcript_effect": "highlight",
 "transcript_color": "#ff5900"
 },
 {
 "name": "Voiceover-1",
 "type": "audio",
 "source": "{{ $('News1').item.json.property_name }}",
 "provider": "openai model=tts-1 voice=onyx"
 }
 ]
 },
 {
 "name": "Auto Scene Comp",
 "type": "composition",
 "track": 1,
 "elements": [
 {
 "name": "Video-2",
 "type": "video",
 "source": "{{ $('Runway - Get Video').first().json.output[0] }}",
 "loop": true
 },
 {
 "name": "Subtitles-2",
 "type": "text",
 "transcript_source": "Voiceover-2",
 "y": "78.2173%",
 "width": "86.66%",
 "height": "37.71%",
 "x_alignment": "50%",
 "y_alignment": "50%",
 "fill_color": "#ffffff",
 "stroke_color": "#333333",
 "stroke_width": "1.05 vmin",
 "font_family": "Inter",
 "font_weight": "700",
 "font_size": "8 vmin",
 "background_color": "rgba(255,255,255,0.2)",
 "background_x_padding": "26%",
 "background_y_padding": "7%",
 "background_border_radius": "28%",
 "transcript_effect": "highlight",
 "transcript_color": "#ff5900"
 },
 {
 "name": "Voiceover-2",
 "type": "audio",
 "source": "{{ $('Article Prep').item.json.message.content['Summary Blurb 1'] }}",
 "provider": "openai model=tts-1 voice=onyx"
 }
 ]
 },
 {
 "name": "Auto Scene Comp",
 "type": "composition",
 "track": 1,
 "elements": [
 {
 "name": "Video-3",
 "type": "video",
 "source": "{{ $('Runway - Get Video2').first().json.output[0] }}",
 "loop": true
 },
 {
 "name": "Subtitles-3",
 "type": "text",
 "transcript_source": "Voiceover-3",
 "y": "78.2173%",
 "width": "86.66%",
 "height": "37.71%",
 "x_alignment": "50%",
 "y_alignment": "50%",
 "fill_color": "#ffffff",
 "stroke_color": "#333333",
 "stroke_width": "1.05 vmin",
 "font_family": "Inter",
 "font_weight": "700",
 "font_size": "8 vmin",
 "background_color": "rgba(255,89,0,0.5)",
 "background_x_padding": "26%",
 "background_y_padding": "7%",
 "background_border_radius": "28%",
 "transcript_effect": "highlight",
 "transcript_color": "#ff0040"
 },
 {
 "name": "Voiceover-3",
 "type": "audio",
 "source": "{{ $('Article Prep').item.json.message.content['Summary Blurb 2'] }}",
 "provider": "openai model=tts-1 voice=onyx"
 }
 ]
 }
 ]
 }
}

nodes.name: Article Prep

values.content:
=prepare the following summary for a newsletter where the article will be 1 of several presented in the newsletter:

{{ $('Article Analysis').first().json.output.summary }}

Make sure the Article Blurb lenght is less than 15 words.

Then, create 2 Summary Blurbs, making sure each is less than 15 words.

Also create 2 image prompts that is less than 15 words long for each Summary Blurb

Output in markdown format
Article Title
Article Blurb
Summary Blurb 1
Summary Blurb 2
Article Image
Image Prompt 1
Image Prompt 2

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: open Ai  A P I details
google Drive  O Auth2  A P I details
configurationSteps: Verify the settings of the trigger node "When clicking ‘Test workflow’".

Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.

testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Upon trigger activation, inputs will flow through the configured nodes and execute actions successfully.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
